message:
feat: Add direct Zig-to-Swift inference integration

Replace subprocess-based ZellBridge with direct C API calls:
- Add -Dstatic build option for libzell.a static library
- Create include/zell.h C header for Swift interop
- Add app/ZellKit/ with module.modulemap for Swift Package Manager
- Update ZellBridge.swift to use zell_init/zell_predict/zell_free_string
- Fix Zig 0.15 calling convention and scheduler.submit API changes

Direct memory access - no server, no HTTP, no subprocess overhead.

files.patch:
@@ -10,9 +10,16 @@ let package = Package(
         .executable(name: "ZellApp", targets: ["ZellApp"])
     ],
     targets: [
+        // ZellKit - C library wrapper for direct inference
+        .systemLibrary(
+            name: "ZellKit",
+            path: "ZellKit",
+            pkgConfig: nil,
+            providers: nil
+        ),
         .executableTarget(
             name: "ZellApp",
-            dependencies: ["GhosttyKit"],
+            dependencies: ["GhosttyKit", "ZellKit"],
             path: "ZellApp",
             resources: [
                 .copy("Resources/terminal.html")
@@ -30,8 +37,10 @@ let package = Package(
                 .linkedFramework("Cocoa"),

+                .linkedFramework("Accelerate"),
                 .linkedLibrary("c++"),
-                .linkedLibrary("z")
+                .linkedLibrary("z"),
+                .unsafeFlags(["-LZellKit", "-lzell"])
             ]
         ),
         .binaryTarget(

@@ -1,143 +1,108 @@
 import Foundation
+import ZellKit
 
-/// CLI wrapper for zell inference
+/// Direct bridge to zell inference engine
 ///
-/// Spawns `zell run` as a subprocess and streams output directly.
-/// No server required - just the zell binary.
+/// Uses libzell.a directly via C API - no subprocess, no HTTP.
+/// Same process, same memory space.
 class ZellBridge {
-    private let zellPath: String
-    private var currentProcess: Process?
+    private var initialized = false
 
     /// Default model path
     var modelPath: String
 
     init() {
-        // Look for zell in bundle first, then common locations
-        let bundledZell = Bundle.main.path(forResource: "zell", ofType: nil, inDirectory: "bin")
-        let homeZell = NSHomeDirectory() + "/.local/bin/zell"
-        let localZell = "/usr/local/bin/zell"
-        let repoZell = NSHomeDirectory() + "/Downloads/repos/zell/zig-out/bin/zell"
-
-        self.zellPath = bundledZell
-            ?? (FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: repoZell) ? repoZell : nil)
-            ?? (FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: homeZell) ? homeZell : nil)
-            ?? localZell
-
-        // Default model
+        // Default model location
         self.modelPath = NSHomeDirectory() + "/.cache/zell/models/default.gguf"
     }
 
-    /// Check if zell binary exists
+    /// Check if zell is initialized
     var isAvailable: Bool {
-        FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: zellPath)
+        zell_is_initialized()
     }
 
-    /// Run a prompt and stream output via callback
-    ///
-    /// - Parameters:
-    ///   - prompt: The user's prompt
-    ///   - model: Model path (optional, uses default)
-    ///   - onOutput: Callback for each chunk of output
-    ///   - onComplete: Callback when generation completes
+    /// Initialize with a model
+    func initialize(model: String? = nil) -> Bool {
+        if initialized { return true }
+
+        let path = model ?? modelPath
+        let result = zell_init(path)
+
+        if result == 0 {
+            initialized = true
+            return true
+        } else {
+            print("zell_init failed with code: \(result)")
+            return false
+        }
+    }
+
+    /// Run a prompt and get result (blocking)
+    func runSync(prompt: String, maxTokens: Int = 256) -> String? {
+        guard isAvailable || initialize() else { return nil }
+
+        guard let resultPtr = zell_predict(prompt, Int32(maxTokens)) else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        let result = String(cString: resultPtr)
+        zell_free_string(resultPtr)
+        return result
+    }
+
+    /// Run a prompt with callbacks (async via DispatchQueue)
     func run(
         prompt: String,
         model: String? = nil,
-        maxTokens: Int = 4096,
+        maxTokens: Int = 256,
         temperature: Float = 0.7,
         onOutput: @escaping (String) -> Void,
         onComplete: @escaping (Error?) -> Void
     ) {
-        // Cancel any existing process
-        cancel()
-
-        let process = Process()
-        process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: zellPath)
-
-        let modelToUse = model ?? modelPath
-        process.arguments = [
-            "run",
-            modelToUse,
-            "--max-tokens", String(maxTokens),
-            "--temperature", String(temperature),
-            prompt
-        ]
-
-        // Set up pipes for output
-        let outputPipe = Pipe()
-        let errorPipe = Pipe()
-        process.standardOutput = outputPipe
-        process.standardError = errorPipe
-
-        // Stream stdout
-        outputPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = { handle in
-            let data = handle.availableData
-            if !data.isEmpty, let str = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) {
+        // Initialize if needed
+        if !isAvailable {
+            let path = model ?? modelPath
+            if !initialize(model: path) {
+                onComplete(ZellError.launchFailed("Failed to initialize zell"))
+                return
+            }
+        }
+
+        // Run inference on background queue
+        DispatchQueue.global(qos: .userInitiated).async {
+            guard let resultPtr = zell_predict(prompt, Int32(maxTokens)) else {
                 DispatchQueue.main.async {
-                    onOutput(str)
+                    onComplete(ZellError.processError(-1, "Prediction failed"))
                 }
+                return
             }
-        }
 
-        // Handle completion
-        process.terminationHandler = { [weak self] proc in
-            // Clean up handlers
-            outputPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = nil
-            errorPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = nil
+            let result = String(cString: resultPtr)
+            zell_free_string(resultPtr)
 
             DispatchQueue.main.async {
-                self?.currentProcess = nil
-
-                if proc.terminationStatus == 0 {
-                    onComplete(nil)
-                } else {
-                    // Read any error output
-                    let errorData = errorPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
-                    let errorMessage = String(data: errorData, encoding: .utf8) ?? "Unknown error"
-                    onComplete(ZellError.processError(Int(proc.terminationStatus), errorMessage))
-                }
+                onOutput(result)
+                onComplete(nil)
             }
         }
-
-        // Start the process
-        do {
-            try process.run()
-            currentProcess = process
-        } catch {
-            onComplete(ZellError.launchFailed(error.localizedDescription))
-        }
     }
 
-    /// Run with async/await streaming
-    func streamRun(
-        prompt: String,
-        model: String? = nil,
-        maxTokens: Int = 4096,
-        temperature: Float = 0.7
-    ) -> AsyncThrowingStream<String, Error> {
-        AsyncThrowingStream { continuation in
-            self.run(
-                prompt: prompt,
-                model: model,
-                maxTokens: maxTokens,
-                temperature: temperature,
-                onOutput: { output in
-                    continuation.yield(output)
-                },
-                onComplete: { error in
-                    if let error = error {
-                        continuation.finish(throwing: error)
-                    } else {
-                        continuation.finish()
-                    }
+    /// Run with async/await
+    func predict(prompt: String, maxTokens: Int = 256) async throws -> String {
+        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { continuation in
+            run(prompt: prompt, maxTokens: maxTokens) { output in
+                continuation.resume(returning: output)
+            } onComplete: { error in
+                if let error = error {
+                    continuation.resume(throwing: error)
                 }
-            )
+            }
         }
     }
 
-    /// Cancel current generation
+    /// Cancel current generation (not supported in sync API)
     func cancel() {
-        currentProcess?.terminate()
-        currentProcess = nil
+        // Direct API doesn't support cancellation yet
     }
 
     /// List available models in cache directory
@@ -153,24 +118,16 @@ class ZellBridge {
             .map { cacheDir + "/" + $0 }
     }
 
-    /// Get model info
-    func modelInfo(_ modelPath: String, completion: @escaping (String) -> Void) {
-        let process = Process()
-        process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: zellPath)
-        process.arguments = ["info", modelPath]
-
-        let pipe = Pipe()
-        process.standardOutput = pipe
-
-        process.terminationHandler = { _ in
-            let data = pipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
-            let output = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
-            DispatchQueue.main.async {
-                completion(output)
-            }
+    /// Cleanup
+    func shutdown() {
+        if initialized {
+            zell_deinit()
+            initialized = false
         }
+    }
 
-        try? process.run()
+    deinit {
+        shutdown()
     }
 }
 
@@ -185,11 +142,11 @@ enum ZellError: Error, LocalizedError {
     var errorDescription: String? {
         switch self {
         case .processError(let code, let message):
-            return "zell exited with code \(code): \(message)"
+            return "zell error \(code): \(message)"
         case .launchFailed(let reason):
-            return "Failed to launch zell: \(reason)"
+            return "Failed to initialize zell: \(reason)"
         case .notAvailable:
-            return "zell binary not found"
+            return "zell not initialized"
         case .modelNotFound(let path):
             return "Model not found: \(path)"
         }

@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+// Zell C API - Direct inference without server
+// Include this header in Swift via bridging header
+
+#ifndef ZELL_H
+#define ZELL_H
+
+#ifdef __cplusplus
+extern "C" {
+#endif
+
+#include <stdbool.h>
+#include <stdint.h>
+
+// Version info
+#define ZELL_VERSION "0.2.0"
+
+/// Initialize Zell with a model file
+/// @param model_path Path to .gguf model file (null-terminated)
+/// @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
+///   -1: Memory allocation failed
+///   -2: Failed to load model
+///   -3: Failed to create scheduler
+int zell_init(const char* model_path);
+
+/// Initialize Zell with custom options
+/// @param model_path Path to .gguf model file
+/// @param max_cells Number of parallel inference cells
+/// @param context_per_cell Context size per cell
+/// @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
+int zell_init_with_options(const char* model_path, int max_cells, int context_per_cell);
+
+/// Run prediction on a prompt (blocking)
+/// @param prompt Input text (null-terminated)
+/// @param max_tokens Maximum tokens to generate
+/// @return Pointer to null-terminated result string, or NULL on error
+/// @note Caller must call zell_free_string() on the result
+char* zell_predict(const char* prompt, int max_tokens);
+
+/// Free a string returned by zell_predict
+/// @param ptr String to free (can be NULL)
+void zell_free_string(char* ptr);
+
+/// Check if Zell is initialized
+/// @return true if initialized and ready
+bool zell_is_initialized(void);
+
+/// Get the number of available cells
+/// @return Number of inference cells
+int zell_cell_count(void);
+
+/// Get the number of idle cells
+/// @return Number of idle cells ready for inference
+int zell_idle_cell_count(void);
+
+/// Cleanup Zell and free resources
+void zell_deinit(void);
+
+/// Get version string
+/// @return Version string (do not free)
+const char* zell_version(void);
+
+/// Get version numbers
+int zell_version_major(void);
+int zell_version_minor(void);
+int zell_version_patch(void);
+
+#ifdef __cplusplus
+}
+#endif
+
+#endif // ZELL_H

@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+// Zell C API - Direct inference without server
+// Include this header in Swift via bridging header
+
+#ifndef ZELL_H
+#define ZELL_H
+
+#ifdef __cplusplus
+extern "C" {
+#endif
+
+#include <stdbool.h>
+#include <stdint.h>
+
+// Version info
+#define ZELL_VERSION "0.2.0"
+
+/// Initialize Zell with a model file
+/// @param model_path Path to .gguf model file (null-terminated)
+/// @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
+///   -1: Memory allocation failed
+///   -2: Failed to load model
+///   -3: Failed to create scheduler
+int zell_init(const char* model_path);
+
+/// Initialize Zell with custom options
+/// @param model_path Path to .gguf model file
+/// @param max_cells Number of parallel inference cells
+/// @param context_per_cell Context size per cell
+/// @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
+int zell_init_with_options(const char* model_path, int max_cells, int context_per_cell);
+
+/// Run prediction on a prompt (blocking)
+/// @param prompt Input text (null-terminated)
+/// @param max_tokens Maximum tokens to generate
+/// @return Pointer to null-terminated result string, or NULL on error
+/// @note Caller must call zell_free_string() on the result
+char* zell_predict(const char* prompt, int max_tokens);
+
+/// Free a string returned by zell_predict
+/// @param ptr String to free (can be NULL)
+void zell_free_string(char* ptr);
+
+/// Check if Zell is initialized
+/// @return true if initialized and ready
+bool zell_is_initialized(void);
+
+/// Get the number of available cells
+/// @return Number of inference cells
+int zell_cell_count(void);
+
+/// Get the number of idle cells
+/// @return Number of idle cells ready for inference
+int zell_idle_cell_count(void);
+
+/// Cleanup Zell and free resources
+void zell_deinit(void);
+
+/// Get version string
+/// @return Version string (do not free)
+const char* zell_version(void);
+
+/// Get version numbers
+int zell_version_major(void);
+int zell_version_minor(void);
+int zell_version_patch(void);
+
+#ifdef __cplusplus
+}
+#endif
+
+#endif // ZELL_H
